raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet winnam ne buhs
dauds Sirguś turreht/ nedstoħs
Landis lett us Egiptes- Semmi
atgreeſtees/ to dauds Sirgu deht/
jo tas KUNGS irr jums faz-
zijs: Tew ne buhs attak gree-
ſtees pa tcho Zeltu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tam arri ne buhs dauds
Seewas apnemt / ka winna
Sirgs ne atkahpj/ tam arri ne
buhs dauds Sudrabu un Seltu
preekſch fewim fafraht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un kad wiꞥſch nu fehdehs
us tawu Walstibas Krehtsu/ tad
buhs tam preekſch tewim fchihs
BauslibasNorakstu kahda Graḣ-
matā rakſtiht / (xemdams to)
no teem Preestexeem un Lewiteem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un ta laid pee winna irr/
ka wiꞥſch eekſch tahs laffa wiﬀu
fawu Muhschu/ ka wiꞥſch mah-
za to KUNGU fawu Deewu bih-
tees / turredams wiﬀus fcahs
Bauslibas Wahrdus/ nn wiﬀ-
fus schohs Likkumus/ ka wiꞥſch
tohs darra.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ka winna Sirgs ne pa-
zettahs pahr faveem Brahteem/
un ka wiꞥſch ne atkahpj no ta
Bauſla pa labbo jeb pa kreifo
Rohku/ tadeht ka wiꞥſchilgi pa-
leek eekſch fawas Walstibas /
wiꞥſch un winna Dehli Israëta
Widui.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Eem Preestexeem/ teem
Lewiteem wiﬀas Lewja-
Zilts/ ne buhs Dallibaĩ
nedß Jhpaſchuman buht ar Isra-
elu/ ta KUNGA Uppurus un
winna Daltau buhs teem ehft.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tapehz laid teem Jhpa-
ſchuns ne irr winno Brahtu
Widdii/tas KUNGS irr winnu
Dalta/ ittin ka wiꞥſch teem run-
najs irr.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Scht nu laid irr to Pree-
steru Teefa no teem Fandim/ no
teem/ kas kahdu Uppuri uppure/
jepſchu tas irr Wehrsis/ jeb Aws/
tad buhs winnam tam Preeste-
ram doht to Plezzu / abbejus
Sohdus/ un to Kungi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tobs Pirmajus tawas
Labbibas/ tawa Wihna/ un ta-
was Etjes / un tohs Birmajus
no tawu Awju Zirpfchanas buhs
tew winnam doht.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo tas KUNGS taws
Deews irr winnam no wiﬀahm
tawahm Ziltim isredſejs/ ka tas
stahw kalpoht ta KUNGA
Wahrdam / wiꞥſch un winna
Dehli wiﬀu Muhschu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un ja kahds Lewits nahks/
no jebkurra tawu Wahrtu no
wiﬀa Israëta/ fur wiꞥſch Swe-
chineeks irr/ un nahe pehz wiﬀ-
fas tawas Dwehfeles Eekahro-
schanas / us to Weetu / fo tas
KUNGS isredſehs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 7,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un wiꞥſch kalpoht eekſch ta
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
